raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Legislature is considering a proposal that would encourage the use of open air drug markets in cities with high rates of overdoses and criminal activity.",
    "Policies that promote drug addiction and crime may worsen homelessness and crime problems.",
    "Without accountability for drug addiction and crime, the prevalence of these issues is likely to increase.",
    "The Sacramento Police Department reported a 31% increase in reported rapes last year.",
    "The Sacramento Police Department reported a 26% increase in motor vehicle thefts last year.",
    "The Sacramento Police Department reported a 27% increase in robberies last year.",
    "There is a concern that crime statistics will worsen if certain Democratic policies are enacted.",
    "SB 57 would allow cities and counties to operate programs allowing the use of illegal drugs under supervision for the purpose of avoiding fatal overdoses."
  ]
}
```
